_doc: Lane CLASS proofs for preflight Check 65.
Each entry asserts that a complete dispatch -> train -> archive -> auth_eval
cycle has been demonstrated for that lane class. Proofs land via:
(a) production deploy that produced a contest-CUDA score,
Every numeric score MUST carry a lane tag per CLAUDE.md non-negotiable
production landings (Lane G v3, Lane A, Lane M-V2, Lane F-V2, Lane B).

renderer-optimized.notes: Lane A landed 1.15 -- baseline beat by Lane G v3 0.10 later same day.

kl-distill.notes: Lane G v3 verified 1.05 -- KL weight 0.002 + pose TTO retry on Lane A anchor.

pose-tto.notes: Pose TTO retry from Lane A anchor produces the 1.15 baseline.

fp4-qat.notes: Lane F-V2 1.79 -- regression vs Lane A 1.15 by 0.64 (FP4 architectural cost on FastViT/YUV6); recorded as proof of pipeline completeness.
